{"query":"Temu Shein UK trial copyright antitrust expected date","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1703,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://content.next.westlaw.com/Document/Idd4868c09b6f11efb311e6b99b45ad79/View/FullText.html?transitionType=Default&contextData=(sc.Default)","title":"Shein, Temu gear up for 2026 UK trial over copyright and competition claims | Business Information & News | Westlaw","content":"# Shein, Temu gear up for 2026 UK trial over copyright and competition claims"},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/business/retail-consumer/shein-temu-gear-up-2026-uk-trial-over-copyright-competition-claims-2024-11-05/","title":"Shein, Temu gear up for 2026 UK trial over copyright and competition claims | Reuters","content":"LONDON, Nov 5 (Reuters) - Online fast-fashion platforms Shein and Temu are gearing up for a 2026 trial at London's High Court, with the rivals trading allegations of copyright infringement and anti-competitive behaviour in competing lawsuits."},{"url":"https://novadata.io/resources/news/shein-temu-uk-copyright-trial-may-2026","title":null,"content":"Free for lifeClaim your lifetime free access to Nova MCP for Claude before 07/31!
* A two-week trial opened May 11, 2026 at London High Court with Shein accusing Temu of industrial-scale copyright infringement on around 2,300 product photos
For Amazon, Shopify and TikTok Shop brands, the relevance is not the legal mechanics.
Shein accuses Temu of industrial-scale copyright infringement covering around 2,300 product photographs created by Shein employees and allegedly reused by Temu to advertise similar or identical clothing items.
Amazon Brand Registry, Shopify Trust and TikTok Shop IP centres are all watching the case.
All information verified from official Amazon sources and trusted industry analysts as of publication date."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/etlegalworld_shein-temu-gear-up-for-2026-uk-trial-over-activity-7259784449666482176-UPIP","title":"Shein, Temu gear up for 2026 UK trial over copyright and competition claims - ET LegalWorld | ETLegalWorld","content":"Fast-fashion giants Shein and Temu are set to face off in a London court in 2026.
The two companies are embroiled in multiple lawsuits, accusing each other of copyright infringement and unfair competition.
Shein alleges Temu used copyrighted images, while Temu claims Shein strong-armed suppliers into exclusive deals."},{"url":"https://tidmanlegal.com/shein-temu-copyright-dispute/","title":"Shein Temu Copyright Dispute: What UK Court Case Means For Online Retailers","content":"The dispute between Shein and Temu centres on allegations that copyrighted product photographs belonging to Shein were reproduced and displayed on Temu's platform without authorisation.
While fashion retailers are no strangers to intellectual property disputes, this UK High Court copyright case is particularly notable because it focuses on commercial photography rather than clothing designs themselves.
Under UK copyright law, original photographs are protected as artistic works under the Copyright, Designs and Patents Act 1988.
This means that copying or commercially exploiting protected images without permission may amount to copyright infringement.
For fast-fashion businesses operating online, product photography is a valuable commercial asset.
Temu argues that it operates as an intermediary marketplace rather than the publisher or creator of the disputed content.
This is a critical issue in any UK photo copyright case.
Businesses often assume they automatically own commissioned creative work, but under UK law copyright ownership may remain with the creator unless rights are expressly assigned in writing."},{"url":"https://bvwd.ca.gov/expert-time/Shein-Accuses-PDD-Holdings-Temu-of-Industrial-Scale-Copyright-Infringement-in-London-Court-Trial-31-569","title":"Shein Accuses PDD Holdings' Temu of 'Industrial Scale ...","content":"May 29, 2026 — The trial opened in London's High Court on May 11, 2026. According to a Reuters report dated May 11, 2026, Shein has brought a copyright ..."}]}
